title: Every Level of Claude Explained in 21 Minutes
summary: Nate Herk provides a tutorial breaking down five levels of Claude mastery, from basic usage to running parallel sessions. The video covers features like artifacts, hidden functionality, and workflow optimization techniques accumulated over 400 hours of hands-on experience.
